meaning: adj.早产的,流产的,失败的;adj.夭折的,异常终止的,中断的
examples: We had to abandon our abortive attempts.
Porsche ran up euro 9 billion in debt when it accumulated a stake in Volkswagen in an abortive takeover.
Why did she give covering fire during an abortive robbery of a Los Angeles shop that sold sportswear?
Despite an abortive bid to buy Palm from 3Com last year, Mr Jobs affects unconcern.
Mr Rakowski's career fizzled out, fittingly, in an abortive bid for the Polish senate in 2005.
